markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on marketing deliverables, performance, and new content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Dip:** Search impressions have leveled off since a late-Jan peak. GrowthX will investigate if this is a technical issue (e.g., sitemap) or self-competition from the subdomain.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**New Content:** Two new initiatives were approved: a Reddit content pipeline launching early March, and testimonial video summaries launching mid-March.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Pricing Strategy:** A debate on public pricing was tabled. GrowthX will research solutions (e.g., `noindex`) to balance lead generation with SEO consolidation.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**HubSpot Tracking:** GrowthX is scoping HubSpot setup to enable first-touch attribution, a key requirement for Understory's company-wide adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

## Topics

### Search Performance & Pricing Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Search impressions have leveled off since a late-January peak.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Self-competition from the subdomain may be dividing SEO attention.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Consolidate services pages onto the main domain.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Alex opposes public pricing, fearing it will deter high-ticket leads before a sales call.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Alex will consult a peer group. GrowthX will research technical solutions (e.g., `noindex`) to hide pages from search while keeping them on the main domain.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [**Reddit Content Pipeline**](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Goal:** Launch a Reddit content pipeline in early March.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Create AI-optimized posts targeting questions on Reddit and in AI overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** Katya will provide topic ideas and analysis by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Testimonial Video Summaries**](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
      - [**Goal:** Convert testimonial videos into case study-style articles.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Method:** Adapt the existing podcast summary pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Launch mid-March, after the Reddit pipeline is live.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### HubSpot & Attribution

  - [**Goal:** Enable first-touch attribution in HubSpot to track lead sources.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Requirement:** Understory needs this setup to support a company-wide HubSpot adoption push.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Status:** GrowthX's technical team is scoping the setup and will provide recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Other Updates

  - [**AI Visibility Win:** Understory content appeared as a first citation and in the response of an AI overview, a key win as these results often outrank traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**Backlinking:** Understory will not pursue backlinking services at this time.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Product Matrix:** GrowthX is building a product matrix to improve content specificity. Understory can provide snippets of how they discuss services to aid this.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Deliver Reddit topic ideas and analysis by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Investigate the search impression dip and report findings.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Scope HubSpot attribution setup and provide recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [Research technical solutions for the pricing/domain consolidation issue.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Adapt the content pipeline for testimonial video summaries (target: mid-March launch).](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [Consult a peer group on public pricing for high-ticket services.](https://fathom.video/share/XTcAFVspxzWp1W6ssBzsxaCJ6ryWU7TX?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
